title: MY CRT SOFTWARE IS AT IT AGAIN TODAY $461 PROFIT ZERO OPEN TRADES
author: Cylosmagic

comments.author: Individual_Track_838
comments.body: Can I know what would be the recommended minimum deposit to use your Algo?

replies.author: Cylosmagic
replies.body: It will work with $500 minimum but you would need to use a cent account or optimise it and use a lot of the safety features which will make it less active and maybe a higher time frame if you used that amount on a normal account.

replies.author: Individual_Track_838
replies.body:
Thank you! What would be the average profit per month if I were to purchase the 1 month gold package with the recommendation you provided?
On top of this, I do have to purchase a VPS as well right?

replies.author: Cylosmagic
replies.body: No the subscriptions runs on my servers….in regards to % ya will make it’s never the same but if your taking the GOLD package ya will get CRT plus the 2 i have running on my MYFXBOOK so tht will be 3 separate accounts I’d look to do 10% on the fxbook software a month and 10-20% on CRT just depends how i set it up and your balances etc and I will run the subscription until you at least double the cost of it so ya walking away with profits before sub ends.

replies.author: Individual_Track_838
replies.body:
Do you mean that I need to have 3 separate trading accounts to run each Algo separately, or all 3 Algo will be running on one trading account simultaneously?
Thank you for the clarifications, I appreciate your time!

replies.author: Cylosmagic
replies.body: Yes if you are choosing the Gold package as tht gives ya 3 bots one on Gold one on forex pairs then one on either crypto or indices nice balance 🫡 and no problem here to answer any questions you might have

replies.author: Individual_Track_838
replies.body: Sorry, yes meaning I have to create 3 separate trading accounts ya?

replies.author: Cylosmagic
replies.body: Yes thats correct it’s very quick and easy takes a few mins but I can help ya with that on which account types you will need etc
